content:
When using Corposant's Overexalt, due to it triggering Aftershock 2 times, you would expect the cost of any Lightning Retribution cards in hand to be reduced 2 times due to the Prepare 1 tag on the card.

However, this does not happen and the cost is only reduced by 1, same as with any other discard/draw effect. Is this intended? If it is intended behavior, honestly it makes the Overexalt very situational and not as impactful as you might expect it to be.

[DeepSeek] <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 
使用「Corposant」的「Overexalt」時，由於它會觸發兩次「Aftershock」，而卡牌上的「Prepare 1」標籤理應讓手牌中任何「Lightning Retribution」的費用降低兩次。

然而，實際情況並非如此，費用僅減少了1次，與其他棄牌/抽牌效果相同。這是設計上的預期行為嗎？如果是的話，坦白說這會讓「Overexalt」變得非常情境化，效果也不如預期中那麼顯著。

目前隨著角色增多，需求不同的密契，以及不同的屬性，配套的密契也越來越多。
可不可以考慮按照密契约類型排序方便玩家選擇？
thread_title: 有沒有考慮出個命輪排序功能
